case_title: FRAZIER, LINDA VS BRUMFIELD, ADELINE MS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY FRAZIER, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT BRUMFIELD, ADELINE MS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRAZIER, LINDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUMFIELD, ADELINE MS. $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $720.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT BRUMFIELD, ADELINE MS. HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF OCT-15-1999, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRUMFIELD, ADELINE MS.
